description: Louvre golden search cases (12): the per-museum accuracy north-star for the Louvre rows in the merged artifact. Authored 2026-07-06 against the PARTIAL 11,950-row fold (45% of the 26,653-object on-view set — the collections.louvre.fr bot wall blocks the rest; Denon-wing paintings incl. La Joconde are not yet hydrated, so the famous-painting cases wait for the full corpus). 7 French-query cases exercise the source-language titles; 5 English-for-French cases exercise the contentless-FTS titleAlt indexing (DeepSeek translations). EN cases assert expectObjectIDs because search results return the French title (titleAlt is index-only in shared/search.ts) — ids are stable 48-bit hashes of louvre/{sourceId}.

cases.note: FR; the icon that IS in the partial corpus (Sully antiquities hydrated)
FR typed WITHOUT accents — unicode61 diacritic folding must match the accented title
FR; accent-folded person name across Egyptian rows (salles 323-335)
EN spelling (no accent); must rank the Louvre statue even though other museums have 'Venus de Milo…' titled works
EN-for-FR via titleAlt ('Hermaphrodite endormi' → 'Sleeping Hermaphrodite'); result title stays French, so assert the id
EN-for-FR via titleAlt; stele or its tablet copy both acceptable
EN-for-FR via titleAlt ('Diane de Versailles'), salle 348
EN-for-FR via titleAlt ('Le gladiateur Borghèse'), salle 106
